LocalDevUserId.name: x-dev-user-id
LocalDevUserId.description: Development-only user ID used when BYPASS_AUTH=true.

DecimalString.description: Prisma Decimal values are serialized as JSON strings over HTTP.

get.description: Public liveness and readiness probe.

200.description: The API and database are healthy.

get.description: Returns the local profile for the authenticated Clerk user.

post.description: Creates a new structural quotation job.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of jobs.
Returns one job by its identifier.

put.description: Partially updates a job by its identifier.

delete.description: Deletes a job by its identifier.

204.description: Job deleted. No response body is returned.

post.description: Creates a new rate master item in the global rate table.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of rate master items.
Returns one rate master item by its identifier.

put.description: Partially updates a rate master item by its identifier.

delete.description: Deletes a rate master item by its identifier.

204.description: Rate deleted. No response body is returned.

post.summary: Create or replace a job's roof
post.description: Creates or replaces the roof configuration for the specified job.

get.description: Returns the roof configuration belonging to the specified job.

put.description: Partially updates the roof configuration for the specified job.

delete.description: Deletes the roof configuration for the specified job.

204.description: Resource deleted. No response body is returned.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of roofs.
